opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My mouth feels like it's stuffed full of burning cotton, and I can't even drink water without wincing. There's a thick white coating all over my tongue and I've lost my sense of taste.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been getting worse over the last couple of days and now it hurts so much I'm barely drinking anything.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 days ago, not long after I finished a course of antibiotics
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days, and the white coating has spread a lot in the last 2 days
symptom_narrative.character: a burning, raw feeling, and a horrible cottony dry sensation in my mouth
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the burning is really bad, especially when I try to eat or drink
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my tongue and the inside of my cheeks, and the corners of my mouth are cracked
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time, worse whenever anything touches my mouth
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: cool bland sips help a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: anything acidic or spicy, orange juice, or rough food makes it sting badly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've completely lost my sense of taste, and the corners of my mouth have started cracking
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm hardly eating or drinking because it hurts so much, and I live on my own

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: just finished a course of antibiotics for a chest infection

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, worried because it's hard to keep fluids up with the pain

objective_data_offered.value: 36.9 C taken at home with my thermometer
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: thick white curd-like patches coating my tongue and the inside of both cheeks
the corners of my mouth are red, cracked and sore
